Title: GameObject Scanner
Description:
All creatures drop a data package on death with all their partd, skills, mutations, stats and other details recorded. You can read these packets, or scan any gameobject, with the commands:

read: reads all combat objects in target cell
readany: reads any objects in cell
readpack: reads game object data packets

There is an option to disable packets dropping on death, you can still read any objects.

the packets spawn on all corpses but may spawn beneath them. they are obvious magenta coffins
